summarization.a: The figure shows the growth rate (nm/cycle) versus the PDMAT dosing (s). The growth rate increases with increasing PDMAT dosing time until it plateaus.
summarization.b: The figure shows the growth rate (nm/cycle) versus the plasma exposure time (s). The growth rate increases with increasing plasma exposure time.
summarization.c: The figure shows the growth rate (nm/cycle) versus the deposition temperature (°C). The growth rate remains constant across different deposition temperatures.

a.question: At what point after PDMAT dosing can the saturation point be observed?
a.answer: The saturation point can be observed after approximately three seconds of PDMAT.

c.question: Which parameters was studied in ALD process?
c.answer: To analyze the growth rate for the ALD process, the deposition temperature was changed from 150 °C to 250 °C.

c.question: How does the growth rate vary with the deposition temperature?
c.answer: The growth rate remains constant across deposition temperatures.
